race.comment: LIUBOV (3) brought strong form to Goulburn first-up, supported, and connections believed she resented the soft shifting track. Had been off the scene for a long while and is sure to have come on. Maps well, and McDougall is a key jockey engagement. She won her Maiden here, and quick improvement is on the cards. BEDDA MIA (6) is busting to win. 12 days ago, she crossed over and led over 1200m at Kembla Grange, beaten less than 1L. Draws even wider today, but she rates to be right in the finish with average luck. TANGO ON (1) led and was close up at Orange on the good and followed with a 1.7L defeat over 1000m at Kembla Grange on a heavy surface. Will likely push forward again and the 3kg claim brings him into it. BABY DAISY (5) found the grade too tough at Goulburn but lengthened nicely to win her Maiden at Albury prior, on a heavy track. Better placed today, and Boudvillain replaces the 3kg apprentice.
